narrative:
Fairfield City has 27,824 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a clear Republican lean of 8.4 percentage points.
